mapper.sql:
SELECT A.ASMT_SBMSN_ID , A.ASMT_ID , A.STD_ID , ( SELECT DEPTNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = ( SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID) ) AS DEPTNM , ( SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = ( SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID) ) AS USERNM , ( SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_USER_ACNT WHERE USER_ID = ( SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID) ) AS USER_ID , A.SBMSN_TYCD , A.TEAM_ID , A.SBMSN_TXT , A.SBMSN_CTS , A.SCR , A.SBMSN_STSCD , ( SELECT CDNM FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE CTGRCD = 'ASMNT_SUBMIT_CD' AND CD = A.SBMSN_STSCD AND ORG_ID = #{orgId}) AS ASMNT_SUBMIT_STATUS_NM , A.SBMSN_CNT , A.CNTN_IP , A.EVLYN , A.SCR_MEMO , A.DELYN , A.EXLN_ASMTYN , A.RESEND_YN , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , B.MDFR_ID AS FILE_RGTR_ID , B.MOD_DTTM AS FILE_REG_DTTM , ( SELECT COUNT(RGTR_ID) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_MTL_EVL T WHERE T.ASMT_SBMSN_ID = A.ASMT_SBMSN_ID AND T.ASMT_ID = A.ASMT_ID) AS EVAL_CNT , NVL( ( SELECT SCR FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_MTL_EVL T WHERE T.ASMT_SBMSN_ID = A.ASMT_SBMSN_ID AND T.ASMT_ID = A.ASMT_ID AND T.RGTR_ID = #{userId} ) , 0) AS EVL_SCR , NVL( ( SELECT ROUND(AVG(SCR), 0) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_MTL_EVL T WHERE T.ASMT_SBMSN_ID = A.ASMT_SBMSN_ID AND T.ASMT_ID = A.ASMT_ID ) , 0) AS AVG_SCORE , ( SELECT COUNT(ASMT_FDBK_ID) FROM TB_LMS_ASMNT_FDBK WHERE ASMT_ID = A.ASMT_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N' ) AS FDBK_CNT FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ASMNT_SBMT_FILE B ON A.ASMT_SBMSN_ID = B.ASMT_SBMSN_ID WHERE A.ASMT_ID = #{asmtId} AND A.DELYN = 'N'
AND A.SBMSN_STSCD IN ('SUBMIT','RE')
AND A.SBMSN_STSCD = 'NO' AND A.RESEND_YN = 'Y'
AND A.SBMSN_STSCD = 'NO' AND A.RESEND_YN = 'N'
AND A.SBMSN_STSCD = #{searchKey}
mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : AsmntStuIndiDAO.selectList 설 명 : 다건 조회 */ SELECT RT.* , (SELECT MOBILE_NO FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = RT.USER_ID) AS MOBILE_NO , (SELECT EMAIL FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = RT.USER_ID) AS EMAIL
, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY RT.USER_ID) AS LINE_NO
, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY (CASE WHEN RT.FILE_REG_DTTM IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), RT.FILE_REG_DTTM) AS LINE_NO
, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY RT.SBMSN_STSCD DESC, RT.USERNM) AS LINE_NO
, COUNT(RT.ASMT_SBMSN_ID) OVER() AS TOTAL_CNT FROM ( ) RT WHERE 1=1
AND RT.STD_ID != ( SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND (ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' OR (ATNDLC_STSCD = 'T')) AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd})
ORDER BY RT.USER_ID
ORDER BY (CASE WHEN RT.FILE_REG_DTTM IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), RT.FILE_REG_DTTM
ORDER BY RT.SBMSN_STSCD DESC, RT.USERNM

/* SQL ID : AsmntStuIndiDAO.selectListPaging 설 명 : 페이징 */ SELECT RT.* , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY RT.USERNM) AS LINE_NO , COUNT(RT.ASMT_SBMSN_ID) OVER() AS TOTAL_CNT FROM ( ) RT WHERE RT.STD_ID != ( SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}) ORDER BY RT.USERNM LIMIT #{firstIndex}, #{listScale}
mapper.update:
/* SQL ID : AsmntStuIndiDAO.updateTarget 설 명 : 과제 참여자 수정 */
MERGE INTO TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN A USING ( SELECT ASMT_ID, ASMT_SBMSN_ID, CASE WHEN SBMSN_STSCD = 'SUBMIT' THEN 'SUBMIT' ELSE #{sbmsnStscd} END AS SBMSN_STSCD FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN WHERE ASMT_ID = #{asmtId} AND ASMT_SBMSN_ID = #{asmtSbmsnId} ) B ON ( A.ASMT_ID = B.ASMT_ID AND A.ASMT_SBMSN_ID = B.ASMT_SBMSN_ID ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.MDFR_ID = #{userId}, A.MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM(), A.SBMSN_TXT = #{sbmsnTxt}, A.SBMSN_CTS = #{sbmsnCts}, A.SBMSN_STSCD = B.SBMSN_STSCD, A.SBMSN_CNT = #{sbmsnCnt}, A.CNTN_IP = #{connIp}, A.SCR = NULL, A.EVLYN = 'N'
mapper.insert: /* SQL ID : AsmntStuIndiDAO.insertTargetHsty 설 명 : 과제 이력 등록 */ INSERT INTO TB_LMS_ASMNT_JOIN_HSTY ( HSTRY_CD, ASMT_SBMSN_ID, ASMT_ID, STD_ID, TEAM_ID, SBMSN_CTS, SBMT_FILE_INFO, CNTN_IP, RGTR_ID, FRST_INQ_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{hstyCd}, #{asmtSbmsnId}, #{asmtId}, (SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S'), #{teamId}, #{sbmsnCts}, (SELECT '제출일시 : ' || TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(MAX(FRST_INQ_DTTM), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') || ' | ' || LISTAGG( FILENM || ' ' || CASE WHEN FILE_SIZE < POWER(1024, 1) THEN FILE_SIZE || ' Bytes' WHEN FILE_SIZE < POWER(1024, 2) THEN ROUND(FILE_SIZE / POWER(1024, 1), 2) || ' KB' WHEN FILE_SIZE < POWER(1024, 3) THEN ROUND(FILE_SIZE / POWER(1024, 2), 2) || ' MB' WHEN FILE_SIZE < POWER(1024, 4) THEN ROUND(FILE_SIZE / POWER(1024, 3), 2) || ' GB' WHEN FILE_SIZE < POWER(1024, 5) THEN ROUND(FILE_SIZE / POWER(1024, 4), 2) || ' TB' ELSE ROUND(FILE_SIZE / POWER(1024, 5), 2) || ' PB' END, ', ' ) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY FILENM) FROM TB_LMS_ATFL WHERE ATCL_ID = #{asmtSbmsnId}), #{connIp}, #{userId}, FN_DTTM() )
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : AsmntStuIndiDAO.selectBest 설 명 : 우수과제 조회 */ SELECT A.ASMT_SBMSN_ID , ( SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = ( SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID) ) AS USERNM , ( SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_USER_ACNT WHERE USER_ID = ( SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID) ) AS USER_ID , A.ASMT_ID , A.STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN A WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.EXLN_ASMTYN = 'Y' AND A.ASMT_ID = #{asmtId}

/* SQL ID : AsmntStuIndiDAO.selectAsmntJoinUser 설 명 : 과제 참여자 정보 조회 */ SELECT A.ASMT_SBMSN_ID , A.ASMT_ID , A.STD_ID , A.SBMSN_TYCD , A.TEAM_ID , A.SBMSN_CTS , A.SBMSN_TXT , A.SCR , A.SBMSN_STSCD , A.SBMSN_CNT , A.CNTN_IP , A.EVLYN , A.SCR_MEMO , A.DELYN , A.EXLN_ASMTYN , A.RESEND_YN , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ATFL WHERE ATCL_ID = A.ASMT_SBMSN_ID) AS FILE_CNT FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN A WHERE A.ASMT_ID = #{asmtId} AND A.ASMT_SBMSN_ID = #{asmtSbmsnId}
